title: identifier case
text: identifier case Case for table and column names USYS$ODx_PARAMS identifier case : upper | lower USYS$ODx_PARAMS id case : upper | lower Arguments upper —uppercase (the default) lower —lowercase Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax ODBC connector ODx USYS$ODx_PARAMS Description The identifier case option specifies the case of names of tables and columns. Related Links entity names Specifies the case for table names. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
